Hero.titlePeace: board games and no place you'd rather be
Hero.subtitle: Craft bar. Mikulandská, Prague 1. Czech craft beer, pet‑nat, board games. Three minutes from Národní třída. Another world.

About.title: A family‑run craft bar. Not a tourist bar. In the heart of Prague 1.
About.description: Separé is a family craft bar at Mikulandská 133/3, Prague 1. Born from a simple idea: we wanted to create a spot in the heart of Prague where we'd actually want to hang out ourselves. No stiff service, no tourist traps, no corporate vibe. An honest family business where you feel like a person, not a patron. We're obsessed with real craft and bold local flavours. We leave the average to others. If it's on our menu, we'd stake our reputation on it.

beer.title: Craft beer from small independent Czech breweries.
beer.text: A carefully curated rotating tap. Always from small, independent Czech breweries. We update the selection regularly so there's always something new to discover.

wine.title: Sparkling Wine & Pet‑Nat.
wine.text: We go way beyond Italian Prosecco. One of the few natural wine bars in Prague city centre. We pour pet‑nat and natural wines. Bubbles best enjoyed when you crack open a whole bottle with friends.

quality.title: Premium Czech wines.
quality.text: We focus strictly on authentic Czech and Moravian wines. No snobby chateau vibes, just honest local juice, including pet‑nats and low‑intervention wines.

games.title: Board games & pub quizzes. Every day, free.
games.text: Over 30 games to borrow for free. From quick party classics to deep strategies. Regular game nights. And our legendary Wednesday pub quizzes. You don't just stop by. You stay.

Menu.title: What's worth drinking and eating
Menu.description: Our complete bar and food menu. From craft beer to honest pub snacks.

items.name: Pinot Blanc (Vajbar Winery)
items.desc: Dry. Aroma: Apples, ripe citrus, dried herbs. Taste: Colorful, fresh and juicy. Subtle oak traces.

items.name: Welschriesling (Mitoma Winery)
items.desc: Dry. Aroma: Firm, full and dynamic. Taste: Round, smooth, pleasantly juicy.

items.name: Gewürztraminer (Mitoma Winery)
items.desc: Semi‑dry. Aroma: Rich, blossoming roses, honey. Taste: Mildly sweet, perfectly matching the aroma.

items.name: Pálava (Mitoma Winery)
items.desc: Semi‑sweet. Aroma: Rich and fresh white roses. Taste: Homemade marmalade fruit, long aftertaste.

items.name: Zweigeltrebe rosé
items.desc: Rosé - semi‑dry. Aroma: Fresh red fruit, spices. Taste: Dynamic, crisp cherries and currants.

items.name: Dornfelder
items.desc: Dry. Aroma: Ripe and full, fresh sour cherry. Taste: Round, subtle tones of cherries and cranberries.

items.name: Primitivo Salento IGP (Italy)
items.desc: Dry. Aroma: Intense plum, forest fruit, dark chocolate. Taste: Fruity, balanced with pepper and coffee.

items.name: Bellenda Prima Cuvée Zero (Treviso DOC)
items.desc: Prosecco Spumante - brut nature. Aroma: Apples, pears, white flowers. Taste: Clean and dry.

items.name: Rebuli Brut (Treviso DOC)
items.desc: Prosecco Spumante - vegan. Aroma: Citrus fruit, trace of cedar. Taste: Dry, fruity structure.

items.name: Perlage Ottantacinque Bio
items.desc: Cuvée Vino Spumante - brut. Aroma: Exotic mango, pineapple. Taste: Balanced, long, easy to drink.

items.name: Integrale Bio
items.desc: Organic Vino Rosé Frizzante - unfiltered. Aroma: Currants, cherries. Taste: Fresh and fruity.

items.name: Mionetto (Treviso DOC)
items.desc: Prosecco Frizzante - brut. Aroma: Fresh, rich fruit. Taste: Harmonious with honey notes.

items.name: Sekt Pinot Blanc (Pavlovín)
items.desc: Brut. Aroma: Floral with pears. Taste: Elegant, mineral with fine acidity.

items.name: Bianco Spumante Alcohol Free
items.desc: Non‑alcoholic. Aroma: Green apples. Taste: Harmonious, fresh, balanced sweet and sour.

items.name: Silvaner (Mádl Winery)
items.desc: White - dry. Aroma: Subtle white flowers. Taste: Fresh aftertaste of greengages.

items.name: Sauvignon Blanc (Mádl Winery)
items.desc: White - dry. Aroma: Blackcurrant, linden flower. Taste: Juicy peach and gooseberry.

items.name: Hibernal (Mádl Winery)
items.desc: White - semi‑dry. Aroma: Apricot and mint. Taste: Ripe peaches with long persistence.

items.name: Riesling (V. Tetur Winery)
items.desc: White - semi‑dry. Aroma: Linden flower, dried apricots. Taste: Harmonious, spicy acidity.

items.name: Chardonnay Remake (V. Tetur Winery)
items.desc: White - dry. Aroma: Spicy yellow melon. Taste: Full, fresh citrus acidity.

items.name: Rrrr cuvée (Maděřič Winery)
items.desc: White (Acacia barrels) - dry. Aroma: Herbal, propolis. Taste: Distinctly mineral, creamy.

items.name: Pálava Orange (Maděřič Winery)
items.desc: Orange wine - dry. Aroma: Exotic fruit, dried apricots. Taste: Juicy, fine tannins.

items.name: Cabernet Sauvignon (V. HORT Winery)
items.desc: Red - dry. Aroma: Black fruit, blackcurrant. Taste: Distinct tannins with smooth acidity.

items.name: Pinot Noir rosé (V. HORT Winery)
items.desc: Rosé - dry. Aroma: Red cherries, wild strawberries. Taste: Harmonious strawberry and honey.

items.name: Blaufränkisch VOC (Mitoma Winery)
items.desc: Red - dry. Aroma: Fresh sour cherry, subtle wood. Taste: Fuller, round with pleasant tannins.

items.name: Bellegrado Barrique Cuvée (Zapletal)
items.desc: Red, Barrique - dry. Aroma: Blackberries, vanilla from the barrel. Taste: Delicious fine tannins.

items.name: Primitivo di Manduria DOC (Italy)
items.desc: Red - dry. Aroma: Currants, plum jam, cocoa. Taste: Full and round, spice and coffee notes.

Salonek.description: We're not a sterile boardroom. We have a private space with a projector. Relaxed atmosphere, good food, good drinks. Birthdays, small company gatherings, larger parties, or just a table for your crew. We tailor everything. We handle the food. On our own for smaller events, with trusted partners for bigger ones.

Reviews.title: Word from the courtyard.
Reviews.description: Separé stands on simple things. Good Czech craft beer, natural wines, a warm atmosphere, and people who keep coming back. This is what you write about us.
Reviews.ctaPrompt: Stopped by and had a good time? We'd love a review, it helps us grow.

r1.name: Martin K.
r1.text: Amazing place with a one‑of‑a‑kind atmosphere. The craft beers are excellent, the staff is friendly, and the courtyard garden is a perfect escape from the city center. We come here regularly for the quizzes.

r2.name: Tereza M.
r2.text: Finally a bar where you can actually sit down without noise and queues. Outstanding wine selection, the pet‑nats are fantastic. We used the private room for a birthday and it was exactly what we wanted.

r3.name: Jakub P.
r3.text: The best urban hideout in Prague. You come for one beer, you leave three hours later with a new favorite board game. The staff is lovely and knows what to recommend. I'll be back.

Moodboard.title: Drop in.
Moodboard.description: A small slice of the Mikulandská atmosphere. The rest is better experienced in person. Over a glass of wine or a board game.

Story.title: The 1891 blueprint. A touch of bureaucracy. And 130 years of patience.
Story.p1: Coincidences don't exist. When we opened Separé in Mikulandská, we had no idea this building had been destined for good drinking since 1891. It took a trip to the old archives to reveal just how close it once came.
Story.p2: In October 1891, the building owner, Mr. J. F. Tomaschek, filed a permit with the Prague magistrate. He wanted to pour wine. But he ran straight into the brick wall of Austro‑Hungarian bureaucracy.
Story.p3a: On a yellowed document from 1895, a brief, handwritten full stop closes the entire project:
Story.p4a: It took long decades before a proper toast was finally raised in this building. Today we pour craft beers from small breweries, open wild pet‑nats, and fill our tables with board games.
Story.p4highlight: Mr. Tomaschek would have loved this little place.
Story.epilogue: We finished what started in 1891. Just with slightly better drinks. And without the imperial stamp.

Events.title: Wednesday quizzes and evenings full of games.
Events.description: Separé is alive. The perfect base for competitive minds, lovers of Czech craft beer, and strategists alike.

quiz.title: Pub Quiz. Every Wednesday from 7 PM.
quiz.desc: Sign up your team, order a few bottles of wine, and show what you know. Seats are limited. Book in advance.

games.title: Board games. Every day during opening hours, free.
games.desc: Over 30 games from quick party classics to deep strategies. Just ask.

tasting.title: Tastings & Vernissages. Occasional.
tasting.desc: Culture comes alive here regularly. Follow our program at @separe_mikulandska.

Contact.title: Come find us in the courtyard.
Contact.description: The entrance is right off the street. Just grab the handle and leave the city noise behind. In summer, we open a quiet courtyard garden hidden in our inner yard. A calm escape in the heart of Prague 1.
Contact.mapDescription: A 3‑minute walk from Národní třída tram stop and metro (Line B). Entrance directly from Mikulandská. No passage, no courtyard. Just grab the handle.
